citation.description: No adapters.jira or acli_subprocess imports; no adapters/jira/ path literals. _load_sibling only used for classify.py and inbound_differ.py (core modules).

criteria.criterion: reconcile_check.py contains NO adapters.jira/acli_subprocess import (any nesting depth) and NO by-path load of a vendor sibling (adapters/jira/... path literal) — verified by the extended case in test_backend_neutrality.py, whose reconcile_check carve-out comment is removed.

citation.description: test_normalized_agree_raw_differ_counts_in_sync and test_real_status_drift_still_reported cover the runny-lens-strafe regression. jira_value in discrepancy records is the raw snapshot value (reconcile_check.py:200-208).

criteria.criterion: Discrepancy decisions are identical to today's for Jira across the Testing cases (including the runny-lens-strafe live-shape regression) and the report's jira_value stays the raw snapshot value — verified by the behavior tests in Testing.

citation.description: Test files exist and are structurally complete; implementation is consistent with no obvious import errors, stubs, or skips. Cannot run tests directly but no red flags found.

criteria.criterion: make lint && make typecheck && make test green; whole test tree collects with 0 errors.

citation.description: reconcile_check.py is in _ZERO_ADAPTER_IMPORT_SCALAR_CORE tuple (line 160) and test_reconcile_check_has_no_vendor_by_path_load (line 167) provides the AST string-constant gate. Old carve-out replaced with note that it was removed (lines 94-96).

criteria.criterion: The AC1 neutrality gate uses BOTH the AST-import case (reconcile_check.py in the tuple) AND a source-text case asserting NO adapters/jira/ path literal in reconcile_check.py — the reconcile_check carve-out comment in test_backend_neutrality.py is removed.

citation.description: backend.outbound.map_fields_to_remote used at line 185; sanitize_description absent. test_no_spurious_truncation_warning in test_reconcile_check_canonical_heldout.py verifies no WARNING emitted.

criteria.criterion: The description comparison uses OutboundMapper.map_fields_to_remote (no warning) + rstrip _text_matches against the canonical remote description — NOT sanitize_description — verified by a behavior test; no logger.warning is emitted on a normal reconcile-check pass.

citation.description: test_annotation_label_precedence_is_canonical verifies that a rebar-status:blocked label makes the canonical remote status 'blocked', and a local 'blocked' ticket is in_sync.

criteria.criterion: A ticket with a rebar-status:blocked/cancelled annotation label reconciles to the correct local status (annotation-label precedence via the canonical mapper) — verified by a behavior test documenting this as the one intended difference from the raw comparison.
